name: Mission Control
description: Mission Control channel plugin for OpenClaw — MC as a native channel. Requires agentToken — create an integration via POST /api/agent-integrations in Mission Control.

mcUrl.description: Mission Control base URL, e.g. http://100.78.2.112:18793

agentToken.description: Agent integration token from Mission Control (mc_xxx...). Create via: curl -X POST MC_URL/api/agent-integrations -d '{"agent_name":"alex"}'

webhookPath.description: Webhook path for MC to post events (default: /mc/webhook)
